oraclePolicy.normative: Kanvas-owned fixtures, bundled deterministic fonts, versioned dumps, CPU oracle artifacts, route diagnostics, and GPU artifacts only when GPU support is claimed.
oraclePolicy.externalComparisons: Optional external comparisons are drift-only and cannot define pass/fail behavior.

nonClaims: This manifest is coordination and evidence infrastructure only; it does not promote complete pure Kotlin text support.
HarfBuzz, FreeType, Fontations, AWT, JNI, CoreText, DirectWrite, fontconfig, platform shapers, and native engines are not normative oracles for this manifest.
No row below claims target-supported behavior.

requiredEvidenceGates: Keep this as CPU-only KFONT-M9-003 rasterization evidence; KFONT-M9-004 SDF boundaries, KFONT-M9-005 atlas lifecycle, and M11 GPU text-route handoff remain separate gates.
Do not claim LCD support, GPU sampling, external rasterizer parity, or dftext retirement from the A8 mask dump alone.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M9-003 A8 rasterization fixture is checked in at reports/font/fixtures/expected/glyph/a8-glyph-mask.json and asserted by GlyphSurfaceTest.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M9-004 through KFONT-M9-006 now land checked-in CPU SDF, atlas lifecycle, and cache telemetry evidence; keep GPU text-route, upload-ordering, and renderer-ownership promotion gated on M11.
Do not claim GPU text routes, LCD support, blocking perf gates, or dftext retirement from CPU-only SDF/atlas/cache evidence without M11 GPU handoff artifacts.
fixtureCommands: No complete-target fixture generation command exists yet; this row tracks required PKT-10 fixture evidence.

requiredEvidenceGates: Keep this as bounded KFONT-M5-003 run-level bidi evidence; full UAX #9 conformance, paragraph visual line ordering, GSUB/GPOS shaping, and GPU text routes remain gated on later tickets.
Expand pinned Unicode Bidi_Class source extracts and conformance fixtures before broadening beyond the checked M5-003 fixture matrix.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M5-003 bidi fixtures are checked in under reports/font/fixtures/expected/unicode and asserted by BidiSegmentationTest against bidi-runs.json.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add broader real-font corpus evidence before claiming complete CFF/CFF2 target support.
fixtureCommands: CFF/CFF2 fixture bytes are generated in font/scaler/src/test/kotlin/org/graphiks/kanvas/font/scaler/FontScalerSurfaceTest.kt.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M5-005 now proves bounded grapheme, bidi-run, and script-run boundary alignment only; GSUB/GPOS shaping, fallback run splitting, and paragraph ordering remain gated on later tickets.
Keep `scaledemoji` fixture-gated on color, route, and rendering evidence; the explicit emoji-sequence refusal and fallback-boundary proofs now live on the owning KFONT-M7-004 slice.
Broaden reviewed CJK IVS coverage before promoting complete cluster-safety coverage.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M5-005 cluster fixtures are checked in under reports/font/fixtures/expected/unicode and asserted by ClusterSafetyTest against cluster-safety-report.json.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M10-001 through KFONT-M10-005 now check in typed COLRv0 plus bounded COLRv1 solid/glyph/colr-glyph, gradient, transform/composite/clip, and recursion/cycle/bounds fixture-manifest evidence with stable artifact-key, bounds, composite facts, expected dump links, and refusal diagnostics; keep bitmap/SVG routes, emoji sequence planning, and GPU registration on their owning M10/M11 tickets.

Do not claim color glyph rendering, emoji shaping, GPU composite execution, dedicated COLRv1 scale/rotate/skew parse-format support, or platform/native fallback from COLRv0/COLRv1 planning evidence alone.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M10-001 through KFONT-M10-005 check in reports/font/fixtures/expected/color/color-glyph-plan.json, reports/font/fixtures/expected/color/colrv1-paint-graph.json, reports/font/fixtures/expected/color/color-glyph-composite-plan.json, and reports/font/fixtures/expected/color/colrv1-fixture-manifest.json, all asserted from ColorGlyphSurfaceTest using synthetic CPAL/COLRv0/COLRv1 table bytes with stable solid, colr-glyph, gradient, transform/composite/clip, cycle, recursion-depth, expanded-paint-budget, malformed-offset, singular-transform, unsupported-composite, and clip-budget-overflow cases.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add Arabic positive and refusal rows for joining forms, lam-alef, marks, cursive attachment, and mixed bidi.
Add Devanagari positive and refusal rows for syllable formation, reph, pre-base matra, below-base forms, and mark placement.
Add Thai positive and refusal rows for base+mark clusters, tone marks, mixed Latin/Thai runs, and paragraph-owned dictionary diagnostics.
Add CJK positive and refusal rows for Han, kana, vertical alternates, variation selectors, and paragraph-owned ruby/line-break diagnostics.
Add emoji shaping positive and refusal rows for VS15/VS16, skin tone, ZWJ sequence, fallback emoji font, and unsupported-sequence refusals.
fixtureCommands: Split complex-script fixtures by script family before any script promotion beyond Latin.
Generate deterministic emoji sequence fixtures and expected dispatch dumps before support promotion.

requiredEvidenceGates: This family remains fixture-gated and non-claiming: the checked-in cluster fixtures do not by themselves promote complete cluster-safe fallback, emoji rendering, host-dependent fallback, or platform fallback support.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M7-004 fallback cluster fixtures are checked in under reports/font/fixtures/expected/fallback and asserted by FallbackSegmentationTest against fallback-segmentation-report.json.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M7-001 now supplies deterministic bundled Hebrew, Arabic, Devanagari, Thai, CJK, and emoji-capable catalog rows plus duplicate-face golden evidence, but this trace family remains bounded until reviewed CPU oracle evidence promotes fallback decisions.
Keep host-dependent system scan facts non-normative; host-scanned examples must stay outside the bundled catalog and shared fallback goldens.
fixtureCommands: Fallback trace fixtures are checked in under reports/font/fixtures/expected/fallback and asserted by FallbackDecisionDumpTest.

targetSpec.section: Font sources, SFNT/OpenType parsing, and collections

fixtureCommands: Current PKT-02A and PKT-03A evidence covers narrower source and face dumps only.

targetSpec.section: Font sources, SFNT/OpenType parsing, and collections

requiredEvidenceGates: Keep the bounded fixture-directory scan explicitly non-normative until a reviewed product decision says whether linked host-dependent examples should be folded into the main bundled catalog or shared fallback dumps.
Broaden beyond the bounded generated fixture directory only with reviewed explicit scan-root provenance and stable host-dependent wording.
Keep all discovery pure Kotlin with no hidden platform font registry or native font API.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M7-005 fixture bytes are generated inside defaultSystemFontScanEvidenceBundle() and asserted against checked-in fallback scan/link goldens.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-002, KFONT-M12-003, KFONT-M12-004, and KFONT-M12-005 own parser/scaler/shaping/paragraph/glyph/GPU producer emission into the shared schema; keep this family schema-only advisory evidence until those subsystem tickets land.
Keep performance budgets advisory until the dedicated promotion policy is updated.
fixtureCommands: Font telemetry schema dumps are checked in under reports/pure-kotlin-text and asserted by FontTelemetrySchemaTest.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M9-003 now attaches sourceRepresentationSha256 linkage and checked-in A8 mask evidence; keep this row as route-taxonomy evidence only until KFONT-M9-004 SDF boundaries and KFONT-M9-005 atlas lifecycle evidence land.
Do not claim GPU text routes, COLR/bitmap/SVG payload support, or dftext retirement from route-plan taxonomy evidence alone.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M9-002 route taxonomy fixture is checked in at reports/font/fixtures/expected/glyph/glyph-artifact-plan.json and asserted by GlyphSurfaceTest.

requiredEvidenceGates: Keep this as KFONT-M9-001 contract evidence; KFONT-M9-003 now lands A8 raster evidence, but KFONT-M9-004 SDF boundaries and KFONT-M9-005 atlas lifecycle evidence still gate broader artifact promotion.
Do not retire dftext or claim GPU text routes from strike-key identity evidence alone.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M9-001 strike-key fixture is checked in at reports/font/fixtures/expected/glyph/glyph-strike-key.json and asserted by GlyphStrikeKeyContractTest.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add DrawTextRun registered artifact fixture evidence.
Add unregistered artifact refusal evidence.
Add upload plan dump evidence.
Add route evidence proving no CPU-rendered texture route.
Add adapter-backed GPU evidence before any GPU support claim.
fixtureCommands: Current PKT-12A/PKT-12B evidence is contract-only and does not activate a GPU text route.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add Latin fixture provenance for cmap-backed glyph IDs, GSUB feature lookup order, and GPOS pair positioning data.
Add requested, enabled, disabled, and unsupported feature dump fields before enabling broader feature behavior.
Add expected glyph ID or fixture-local glyph-name dumps for liga, kern, requested-off, and unsupported-feature cases.
Add cluster range and fallback diagnostic expectations for every Latin fixture row.
Keep Greek, Cyrillic, Hebrew, and complex-script promotion out of this Latin contract slice.
fixtureCommands: Generate deterministic Latin GSUB/GPOS fixtures and reviewed dump goldens before implementing wider shaping support.

requiredEvidenceGates: Implement bounded GSUB lookup behavior before claiming OpenType substitution support.
Implement bounded GPOS positioning behavior before claiming OpenType positioning support.
Add per-script positive and refusal fixtures from the required script matrix before broad shaping promotion.
Add CPU oracle evidence for promoted glyph ID, cluster, and position behavior before target-supported classification.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M6-001 contract goldens are checked in under reports/font/fixtures/expected/shaping and asserted byte-for-byte by OpenTypeLayoutEngineContractTest.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add selection boxes and hit testing evidence.
Retain complete fallback policy, full bidi visual ordering, selection, hit testing, and full paragraph parity as separate gates.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M8-001 through KFONT-M8-006 now cover paragraph input contracts, shaping-request segmentation goldens, bounded UAX #14 line-break maps, bounded end-ellipsis paragraph layout dumps, and bounded placeholder geometry only.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add bidi visual line ordering rows that name PKT-07 and PKT-08 shaping blockers separately.
Add hit-test, selection box, word boundary, and grapheme boundary golden rows.
Keep paragraph-owned layout diagnostics separate from shaping-owned fallback and script diagnostics.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M8-006 now adds bounded placeholder-layout geometry evidence; later rows must still name full bidi visual ordering, selection, and hit-test blockers explicitly.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M10-006 lands checked-in CPU-side bitmap plan and refusal evidence only; keep M11 GPU texture/upload/sampling proof as a separate gate before any renderer support claim.
Do not claim non-PNG bitmap payload support, platform/native codec support, emoji sequence support, or retirement of scaledemoji_rendering from bitmap-glyph-plan.json alone.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M10-006 checks in bitmap-glyph-plan.json for CBDT/CBLC PNG, sbix PNG, and refusal coverage; keep GPU upload/sampling evidence gated on M11.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add cmap format 14 positive variation-selector fixture rows.
Add cmap format 14 unsupported or malformed refusal rows without claiming complete cmap coverage.
fixtureCommands: Generate or bundle deterministic malformed SFNT fixtures with expected diagnostics before parser support promotion.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M5-004 provides bounded script itemization fixtures and script-run diagnostics only; GSUB/GPOS shaping dumps with feature order, fallback runs, and glyph output remain gated on later shaping tickets.
Add one positive fixture and one refusal or diagnostic fixture for every row in the required script matrix before promoting complete shaping coverage.
Keep external drift comparisons non-normative.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M5-004 script itemization fixtures are checked in under reports/font/fixtures/expected/unicode and asserted by ScriptItemizationTest against script-runs.json.

requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M10-008 adds checked-in svg-glyph-fixture-manifest.json with positive bounds hashes and explicit refusal classes; keep KFONT-M10-010 color/emoji manifest convergence and M11 GPU SVG route proof as separate gates.
Do not claim dynamic SVG support, native SVG renderer parity, or GPU SVG route support from svg-glyph-plan.json and svg-glyph-fixture-manifest.json alone.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M10-007 and KFONT-M10-008 check in svg-glyph-plan.json plus svg-glyph-fixture-manifest.json for static path/basic-shape, gradient/transform/clip, defs/symbol/use, explicit refusal classes, and bounded budget refusals.

Current PKT-04 evidence covers TrueType glyf scaler evidence, composite transform/point-matching/component-count evidence, bounded gvar IUP interpolation, horizontal phantom-point advance deltas, avar-normalized variation dumps, bounded HVAR advance-width deltas, explicit vertical metric present/fallback/diagnostic states, bounded VVAR advance-height deltas, bounded MVAR vertical-global metric deltas, malformed HVAR/MVAR table diagnostics, malformed loca/glyf isolation evidence, and malformed tuple diagnostics while broader variable-font parity and vertical layout claims remain out of scope.

requiredEvidenceGates: Keep generated seed data as bounded fixture evidence for the reviewed M5 rows; full Unicode data remains gated on future source extract expansion.
Add full UCD fixture regeneration and rebaseline review before expanding beyond the checked-in source extracts.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M5-001 bounded seed generation is exercised by UnicodeDataGenerationTest from checked-in source extracts; ordinary tests do not download Unicode data.

requiredEvidenceGates: Keep KFONT-M5-002 grapheme segmentation coverage bounded to the checked fixture matrix until a future reviewed full UAX #29 source expansion exists.
Do not promote shaping, paragraph, emoji rendering, word breaking, sentence breaking, line breaking, or GPU text routes from this segmentation evidence.
fixtureCommands: KFONT-M5-002 uses checked-in bounded Unicode 16.0 source extract rows packaged as font:text resources plus GraphemeSegmentationTest; ordinary tests do not download Unicode data or call platform segmenters.
